notes:
All issues revolve around Uplay. Proton 3.16 and 3.7 don't seem to launch Uplay, but that may be a false flag, and Proton 4.2 works fine for me. Upon exiting Eagle Flight, Uplay remains open as a system applet causing steam to think the game is still running. Manually closing Uplay works fine.

Outside of the minor Uplay bugs, the game runs like native Windows once you're in.
title: Eagle Flight
